title: Hieracium pseudomurrianum
intro: Hieracium pseudomurrianum, also known as False Hawkweed or Irish Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbalism, Hieracium pseudomurrianum is often used to prepare teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
